json_data.title: Shortest Job Next (SJN) and Shortest Remaining Time First (SRTF) CPU Scheduling
json_data.reason: This topic introduces more efficient non-preemptive and preemptive scheduling strategies that directly address the performance limitations of FCFS.

json_data.title: Real-Time CPU Scheduling Algorithms
json_data.reason: This explores scheduling algorithms designed for systems with strict timing constraints, a significant step up from general-purpose scheduling in terms of complexity and criticality.

json_data.title: Adaptive and Predictive CPU Scheduling using Machine Learning
json_data.reason: This involves designing intelligent scheduling policies that dynamically adapt to changing workloads and system conditions, an active area of research leveraging advanced computational techniques.
